column2:
name: build
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: myapp
  labels:
    app: myapp
spec:
  containers:
    - name: web
      image: nginx

- name: install packages
  become: true
- name: start service
  become: false

database:
  host: localhost
  port: 5432
  name: mydb
cache:
  enabled: true
  ttl: 3600
